title: CLIENT GETNAME
description: Returns the name of the connection.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
The `CLIENT GETNAME` returns the name of the current connection as set by [`CLIENT SETNAME`](). Since every new connection starts without an associated name, if no name was assigned a null bulk reply is returned. ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** One of the following: * [Bulk string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#bulk-strings): the connection name of the current connection. * [Nil reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#bulk-strings): the connection name was not set. **RESP3:** One of the following: * [Bulk string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#bulk-strings): the connection name of the current connection. * [Null reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#nulls): the connection name was not set.
intro: The `CLIENT GETNAME` returns the name of the current connection as set by [`CLIENT SETNAME`](). Since every new connection starts without an associated name, if no name was assigned a null bulk reply is returned.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The `CLIENT GETNAME` returns the name of the current connection as set by [`CLIENT SETNAME`](). Since every new connection starts without an associated name, if no name was assigned a null bulk reply is returned.

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

One of the following:
* [Bulk string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#bulk-strings): the connection name of the current connection.
* [Nil reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#bulk-strings): the connection name was not set.

**RESP3:**

One of the following:
* [Bulk string reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#bulk-strings): the connection name of the current connection.
* [Null reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#nulls): the connection name was not set.
